Mon - Fri: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM

home.heroEyebrow: DTCA TRADING AND TECHNICAL COMPANY LIMITED
home.heroTitle: Comprehensive automation, SCADA and electrical-equipment solutions
home.heroDescription: DTCA was founded by experienced engineers in automation, information systems and power systems, delivering the most reliable and safe solutions to our customers.
home.introBody:
DTCA Trading and Technical Company Limited (DTCA) was founded by experienced engineers in automation, information systems and power systems. DTCA was established with the mission of solving power-industry challenges and delivering the best solutions to bring economic efficiency that meets customer needs.

DTCA partners with leading domestic and international brands in electrical equipment and automation such as Phoenix Contact, Siemens, Mitsubishi, ABB, Sick, Taikai and Chint to deliver the most reliable and safe automation solutions.

DTCA always operates under the principle of "SAFETY - SCHEDULE - EFFICIENCY - QUALITY", aiming for the complete trust and satisfaction of our customers on every project.
home.servicesDescription: Three core capability groups that help DTCA accompany customers from design and construction to system operation.
home.solutionsDescription: DTCA has successfully delivered numerous projects across key energy and industrial sectors.
home.partnersDescription: DTCA supplies and integrates equipment from leading domestic and international brands.
home.newsDescription: Latest updates on DTCA's activities, projects and technology.
home.ctaDescription: Get in touch now for consultation on automation, SCADA and electrical-equipment solutions tailored to your project.

scada.title: SCADA/DCS Automation Solutions
scada.intro: DTCA provides comprehensive automation solutions, from designing and installing SCADA/DCS systems to integrating monitoring and control software for power plants and industrial production lines.
items: Design and installation of SCADA/DCS systems for hydropower, thermal power and solar power plants
Supply of SCADA software from Triangle MicroWorks, Siemens, ABB
Configuration, commissioning tests, and recovery of SCADA/DCS systems
Data connection and transmission to power system load-dispatch centers (A0/A1/NSO)
Testing of generator governor and excitation systems

infoSystems.title: Information Systems
infoSystems.intro: DTCA supplies and designs network infrastructure and information security to serve operational data connectivity for substations, power plants and industrial parks.
items: Layer 3 and Layer 2 switches from Cisco, Valiant, Juniper
Robustel routers for remote data transmission
Recovery and upgrade of telemetry channels to load-dispatch centers
Consulting and design of network infrastructure for SCADA/DCS systems

primaryEquipment.title: Primary Equipment & Protection-Control Cabinets
primaryEquipment.intro: DTCA supplies, designs and installs primary equipment and various protection-control cabinets for 110kV-220kV substations and industrial plants.
items: Motor control cabinets and control desks
Primary equipment from ABB, Siemens, Taikai, Chint

solutions.pageDescription: DTCA accompanies customers across key energy and industrial manufacturing sectors, from hydropower, thermal power and solar power to substations and manufacturing plants.

nha-may-dien.title: Power Plants (Hydropower - Thermal Power)
nha-may-dien.description: Design, installation, configuration and recovery of SCADA/DCS systems for hydropower and thermal power plants nationwide.

dien-mat-troi.title: Solar Power
dien-mat-troi.description: Configuration and testing of SCADA monitoring systems for solar power plants.

tram-bien-ap.title: 110kV - 220kV Substations
tram-bien-ap.description: Equipment supply, configuration and commissioning tests of SCADA systems and protection relay equipment for transmission and distribution substations.

san-xuat-cong-nghiep.title: Industrial Manufacturing
san-xuat-cong-nghiep.description: Automation and SCADA solutions for cement plants, steel plants, seaports and irrigation infrastructure.
